title: schizachyrium mexicanum
intro: Schizachyrium mexicanum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Little Bluestem include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Little Bluestem is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
